productDisplayName: Nike Women Snapper Thong Flip Flop
description: Style Note One look at these flip flops and your feet are bound to sigh with the pleasure of relaxation. The nike Snapper thongs are designed keeping in mind absolute cushioned comfort to relax your feet and offer a comfortable ride.  Product Details Green flip flop with synthetic leather thong straps and a toe separator Embroidered nike swoosh logo on the lateral strap Cushioned phylon footbed in dual tone with a Nike swoosh logo for all-day comfort and style TPR outsole with strategically placed lugs for absolute grip and traction on various surfaces Material and Care Rubber, synthetic Remove dust and dirt with damp, clean cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
